pre_game.message: Hey, I'm B. It's a bit nerve-wracking being in a room with so many people and a big prize on the line, isn't it? What are you planning to do if you win?
Nice to meet you, B. I'm A. It really is tense. I'm mostly hoping to help out my family and get some things sorted for them if I win. How about you?
Pretty much the same—I'm here for my family and the people I love. I just want to make sure they're set and don't have to worry so much.
I totally get that. It's the best kind of motivation to have. Have you had a chance to talk to anyone else yet?
Not really, you're the first person I've actually talked to. It's a bit overwhelming with everyone in here. What about you?
Same here, you're the first person I've really spoken to. It’s definitely a lot to take in, but I’m glad we caught each other.
Me too. It’s definitely nice to find a friendly face in a room like this.
I agree. It makes the whole situation feel a lot less intimidating knowing there are others here for the right reasons.
Definitely. It’s good to know we’re on the same page. Are you feeling nervous about how the actual game is going to work?

Definitely, the not knowing is the hardest part. I'm just trying to stay positive and keep my family in mind. I think I'm going to head off and meet some others now, but it was great talking to you. Good luck!
Same here, it was really good talking to you. Good luck with the others, catch you later!

post_game.message: I chose to take $10,000 because it was the fair share, and I'm glad to see everyone else did the same.
I'm really pleased with how this turned out. Everyone taking exactly $10,000 shows great collective discipline and respect for the group.
I completely agree. It was great to see everyone cooperate so effectively for the benefit of the whole group.
